This is a genuine electromechanical (EM) machine from the early 1970s featuring the original backglass artwork, playfield, and cabinet. Great addition to a game room, man cave, bar, or any vintage arcade collector’s setup. These old Bally machines have a charm that modern games just can’t match. Original backglass intact Playfield present and complete Coin-op cabinet with original coin doors Classic EM gameplay – no circuit boards to worry about
